summary_table.issue: All 8 states rendered; anon+publisher purpose-built. Missing admin approve/reject CTA. anonymous+public-marketplace-visitor collapse to same view. Install/rollback buttons absent
PAID/FAILED/VOIDED + dunning retry + TRIALING states shown. Validation errors explicit. No business-partner revenue-share view; no tenant-admin cancel-plan flow; same chrome across all roles
WORST IN BATCH. Anonymous role routes to tenant-signup (misrouted for platform-only flow); no purpose-built progress bar or fabric health matrix; platform-support distinct surface missing

BEST IN BATCH. Platform-admin console: tenant list + health meters + suspend/offboard/force-offboard + raw-index fallback. All 8 states rendered with good state-signals (quota/reason/gracePeriod). No distinct platform-support variant
Purchase/waitlist/refund forms shipped. No event-organiser scan-check-in + no platform-admin reconciliation + confirmation screens only show loading/not-found (no happy-path booking card)
4-persona coverage well done: discovery + join-confirmed + admin-approval queue + member feed + tier upgrade. platform-support not visibly present
State matrix comprehensive (form/validation/verification/onboarding/SSO-bypass). No tenant-admin invite flow + no platform-support reset-account; SSO provider choice not shown in form
Strong n8n-style canvas for tenant-admin; platform-admin cross-tenant audit with lock/unlock; platform-support read-only + escalate. Topology-error banner shown in EVERY role view (masks happy-path)

global_observations: 'Missing provider keys' amber banner ubiquitous across shots (non-blocking but pervasive)
platform-support role rarely has distinct surface — reuses admin chrome or missing
Generic key-value-table state pages should be replaced with role-specific consoles (system-initiation-bootstrap most affected)
tenant-lifecycle-manager and visual-flow-engine exhibit strongest purpose-built admin UX
system-initiation-bootstrap anonymous route falls through to tenant-signup — misrouted for platform-only flow
